description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features a mix of white and beige exterior walls, large glass windows, and a combination of wood and concrete finishes. The front facade includes a prominent entryway and several large, floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The rear section appears to have a partially covered patio or outdoor area, with green landscaping elements visible. The roofline is clean and minimalistic, with some sections extending to provide shade or cover. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of white, beige, and wood finishes. The design features open spaces and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a clean, modern facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and a partially covered outdoor area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio or outdoor living space, with wood paneling and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roof sections and a mix of window sizes along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
